name: Double Chocolate Mint Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 1 10-oz bag of Nestles Toll House Mint-Chocolate Chips divided in half for this recipe.
2. Melt 3/4 cup of mint-chocolate chips over hot (not boiling) water, stirring until smooth. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat butter, brown sugar, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract until creamy. Add melted chips and egg; beat well.
5. Gradually blend in the flour mixture. Stir in remaining mint-chocolate chips and nuts.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 375 degrees F for 8 to 10 minutes. Allow to stand 2 to 3 minutes, then remove from cookie sheets.
8. Cool completely on wire racks.
